headings.text: Connect with thousands of investors in seconds
How Angel Match unlocks your startup's potential
Find the right investor to fund your dream
How to find your investor with Angel Match
Founders around the world love Angel Match
Stop wasting time to manually look for investors
Investors from the top VC funds

featureBullets: How do I know if my data is secure? Do you share it with anyone? Don't worry, we do not share your information with third parties. We guarantee all your data is encrypted and safe with Angel Match.
What type of investors do you have? Our database has investors from different industries mostly made up of angels, venture capitalists, and private equity firms.

How do I reach out to these investors? You can email your prospects by exporting their contacts in CSV files or using the Angel Match 'Email Outreach' section directly. Although, please don't spam these investors!
Do you provide a free trial? Yes. While you are signing up with any of our plans, you’ll be asked if you want to have a 3-day trial. Simply choose that option and you are all set.
I just want to use Angel Match once to export data. Is that possible? Yes. You're free to take a subscription just for one month and cancel it when your work is done.
Is your question not answered? Send us a message over there 👉 Or email us at [email protected]
